name: Full Body Burn
description: Advanced full body session combining strength and cardio

exercises.name: Burpee
instructions: Stand tall then squat down and place hands on floor
Jump feet back into plank position
Perform a push-up at the bottom
Jump feet forward and explode upward
exercises.formTip: Full burpee with push-up at the bottom

exercises.name: Bodyweight Squat
instructions: Stand with feet shoulder-width apart
Lower your body by bending knees and hips
Keep chest up and core engaged
Push through heels to return to standing
exercises.formTip: Deep squat, chest up, drive through heels

exercises.name: Push Up
instructions: Start in high plank with hands shoulder-width apart
Lower your chest toward the floor
Push back up to starting position explosively
Keep body in a straight line throughout

exercises.name: Forward Lunge
instructions: Stand tall with feet together
Step forward with one leg
Lower back knee toward the floor
Push off front foot to return to standing

exercises.name: Dumbbell Shoulder Press
instructions: Hold dumbbells at shoulder height
Press weights overhead until arms fully extend
Lower back to shoulder height with control
Keep core braced throughout the movement
exercises.formTip: Control the press, full lockout at top

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
instructions: Stand holding dumbbells in front of thighs
Hinge at hips pushing them backward
Lower weights along your legs feeling the stretch
Drive hips forward to return to standing
exercises.formTip: Hinge at hips, feel the stretch in hamstrings

exercises.name: Mountain Climber
instructions: Start in a high plank position
Drive one knee toward your chest
Alternate legs with quick controlled movements
Keep hips level and core engaged throughout

exercises.name: Glute Bridge
instructions: Lie on your back with knees bent and feet flat
Push hips up toward the ceiling
Squeeze glutes hard at the top
Lower back down slowly with control

exercises.name: Plank
instructions: Place forearms on the ground with elbows under shoulders
Extend legs back and rise onto your toes
Keep body in a straight line from head to heels
Hold position while breathing steadily

exercises.name: Jumping Jack
instructions: Stand with feet together and arms at sides
Jump feet apart while raising arms overhead
Jump back to starting position
Maintain a steady rhythm throughout
exercises.formTip: Full arm extension overhead on each jump
